description: Sign and verify with deterministic DRBG k — key 0x1e5edd45, message 0xdeadbeef

expected.note: DER length asserted in ECDSA.test.ts line 25: encoded.length === 71

description: Sign with custom k=1358 and verify — same key and message

expected.note: Asserted in ECDSA.test.ts: ECDSA.sign(msg, key, undefined, new BigNumber(1358)) verifies true

description: Verify fails for wrong message — same key and signature

expected.note: Asserted in ECDSA.test.ts: verify(wrongMessage, signature, pub) === false

description: Verify fails for wrong public key — message and signature correct but pubkey mismatched

expected.note: Asserted in ECDSA.test.ts: verify(msg, signature, wrongPub) is falsy; wrongPub = curve.g.mul(new BigNumber(33))

description: forceLowS — signature s value must be <= n/2

expected.note: Asserted in ECDSA.test.ts: sign.s.cmp(curve.n.ushrn(1)) <= 0 is truthy
Asserted in ECDSA.test.ts: k=1 produces valid signature
Asserted in ECDSA.test.ts: k=n-1 produces valid signature

description: k=0 throws — invalid k below range

expected.note: Asserted in ECDSA.test.ts: k=0 must throw
